creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Seems fixed:

markj@xinde> valgrind --leak-check=full ./acl

==1466==    indirectly lost: 0 bytes in 0 blocks
==1466==      possibly lost: 0 bytes in 0 blocks
